name: Chiles Rellenos De Queso
recipeInstructions:
1 Prepare tomato sauce by combining 1 1/3 medium tomatoes (peeled), 3/16 teaspoon salt, 1/3 small onion, 1/3 clove garlic, and 3/16 cup chicken broth in a blender or food processor. Puree the mixture.
2 Heat oil in a large skillet until it reaches 365°F (185°C). Beat egg whites in a medium bowl until stiff peaks form. Beat egg yolks lightly and fold them into the beaten egg whites.
3 Roll each roasted and peeled chile in flour, then dip in the egg mixture to coat.
4 Fry the chiles in hot oil until golden brown, turning occasionally with a spatula. Drain on paper towels.
5 Serve immediately topped with tomato sauce.
Tomato Sauce:
1 In a medium saucepan, heat 3/16 cup oil.
2 Add pureed tomatoes, onion, and garlic; cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3 Stir in chicken broth, salt, chiles, cloves, and cinnamon. Simmer gently for 15 minutes.
